regions.text: This curving line shows how the world has grown from simple to complex over time.
(Diagram: A graph with a curve rising sharply to the right. Left is the 'PAST', bottom right is 'SIMPLE', top right is 'COMPLEX').
The past is on the left, and humans today are at the top of the curve. Long ago, changes were simple compared to the complex changes in us today.
The higher the curve goes, the more complex the changes become. We are living through the most complex stage of growth.
